full_text:
Ji Miao (Wenran) 吉邈 (文然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Miao (吉邈), styledWenran (文然). Son of Ji Ping. Joined Geng Ji’s coup to avenge his father but was killed in the fighting. Ji Miao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Han Dynasty. Ji Miao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
